mapper.select: SELECT ERROR_CODE AS errorCode, TRX_ID AS trxId, ERROR_TITLE AS errorTitle, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, ORG_ID AS orgId, ORG_ERROR_CODE AS orgErrorCode, ERROR_LEVEL AS errorLevel, ERROR_HTTPCODE AS errorHttpcode, FINAL_APPROVAL_STATE AS finalApprovalState, FINAL_APPROVAL_DTIME AS finalApprovalDtime, FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_ID AS finalApprovalUserId, FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_NAME AS finalApprovalUserName FROM FWK_ERROR WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_ERROR ( ERROR_CODE, TRX_ID, ERROR_TITLE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, ORG_ID, ORG_ERROR_CODE, ERROR_LEVEL, ERROR_HTTPCODE, FINAL_APPROVAL_STATE, FINAL_APPROVAL_DTIME, FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_ID, FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_NAME ) VALUES ( #{dto.errorCode}, #{dto.trxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.errorTitle}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.orgId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.orgErrorCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.errorLevel}, #{dto.errorHttpcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_ERROR SET TRX_ID = #{dto.trxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ERROR_TITLE = #{dto.errorTitle}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId}, ORG_ID = #{dto.orgId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_ERROR_CODE = #{dto.orgErrorCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ERROR_LEVEL = #{dto.errorLevel}, ERROR_HTTPCODE = #{dto.errorHttpcode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ERROR WHERE ERROR_CODE = #{errorCode}

choose.otherwise: AND (e.ERROR_CODE LIKE '%' || #{searchValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR e.ERROR_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')

choose.when: ORDER BY (SELECT ed.ERROR_CAUSE_DESC FROM FWK_ERROR_DESC ed WHERE ed.ERROR_CODE = e.ERROR_CODE AND ed.LOCALE_CODE = 'KO' AND ROWNUM = 1) DESCASC

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT e.ERROR_CODE FROM FWK_ERROR e
INNER JOIN FWK_ERROR_HANDLE_APP eha ON e.ERROR_CODE = eha.ERROR_CODE
WHERE 1=1
)

SELECT DISTINCT e.ERROR_CODE, e.TRX_ID, e.ERROR_TITLE, e.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, e.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, e.ORG_ID, e.ORG_ERROR_CODE, ed.ERROR_CAUSE_DESC, e.ERROR_LEVEL, e.ERROR_HTTPCODE, e.FINAL_APPROVAL_STATE, e.FINAL_APPROVAL_DTIME, e.FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_ID, e.FINAL_APPROVAL_USER_NAME, (SELECT LISTAGG(ha.HANDLE_APP_NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ha.HANDLE_APP_NAME) FROM FWK_ERROR_HANDLE_APP eha2 INNER JOIN FWK_HANDLE_APP ha ON eha2.HANDLE_APP_ID = ha.HANDLE_APP_ID WHERE eha2.ERROR_CODE = e.ERROR_CODE) AS HANDLE_APPS, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_ERROR_HIS eh WHERE eh.ERROR_CODE = e.ERROR_CODE) AS ERROR_COUNT FROM FWK_ERROR e LEFT JOIN FWK_ERROR_DESC ed ON e.ERROR_CODE = ed.ERROR_CODE AND ed.LOCALE_CODE = 'KO'
INNER JOIN FWK_ERROR_HANDLE_APP eha ON e.ERROR_CODE = eha.ERROR_CODE
WHERE 1=1
